raw.subject: Keep on truckin 419 Towing & Auto Transp.
raw.body:
Hi,

You recently used a clever call-to-action to ask customers for feedback on your Facebook page.
But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be costing you bookings from potential customers who prefer to look up businesses online.
I sketched a page idea from your Facebook that includes an emergency call CTA, a list of your services, and a service area map to help customers find you.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/419-towing-auto-transport-llc-toledo

Let's discuss how a simple website can help you serve your Toledo community more effectively, and I can offer you a flat fee for local businesses like yours.
